summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of V6 UI/UX Update for Niro Astrology App. All 15 features tested and verified. HomeScreen displays correctly with 3 category modules (Love, Career, Health), 18 tiles total, 'Talk to Expert' as primary teal CTA and 'Chat with Mira (AI)' as secondary white CTA. TopicLandingPage shows correct V6 content including hero one-line promise, personalized greeting, tier selector with Recommended badge only on Supported tier, tier summary with Duration/Consultations/Follow-ups/Support fields, refund guarantee, Outcomes section with Clarity/Timeline/Support subsections, 'How will your journey unfold' section, Experts Widget with 3 cards and horizontal scroll, Remedies section with 'Coming soon' CTA, and simplified sticky bar with Price + 'Start my journey' only.

issues: Chat with Mira modal appears automatically on landing page navigation - may block user interaction with tier tabs if not dismissed

critical_code_review_comments: All V6 HomeScreen features implemented correctly
All V6 Landing Page features implemented correctly
18 tiles organized in 3 categories (Love: 6, Career: 6, Health: 6)
Talk to Expert is PRIMARY (teal rgb(62,130,122)) and Chat with Mira (AI) is SECONDARY (white)
Recommended badge ONLY on Supported tier selector tab
Tier Summary Card shows Duration, Consultations, Follow-ups, Support: Unlimited chat
Refund guarantee 'No questions asked — 7 day full refund guarantee' appears after tier summary
Outcomes section has Clarity, Timeline, Support subsections with proper bullets
'How will your journey unfold' section displays tier-specific bullets
Experts Widget shows 3 expert cards with horizontal scroll
Sticky bar shows only Price + 'Start my journey' button
Tier switching updates all content correctly (Focussed/Supported/Comprehensive)
context_for_next_testing_agent: V6 UI/UX update fully tested. Key test selectors: tile-{id} for all 18 tiles, talk-to-expert-btn, chat-with-mira-btn, tier-tab-{focussed|supported|comprehensive}, tier-summary-card, experts-widget, expert-card-{0|1|2}, remedies-section, remedies-coming-soon, sticky-cta-bar, start-journey-btn, landing-back-btn. Login with any email and click through onboarding (Continue/Get started/Start Exploring). Note: Chat with Mira modal may appear on landing page - can be dismissed with Escape key or close button.

homescreen_3_category_modules.details: Love & Relationships (6 tiles), Career & Money (6 tiles), Health & Wellness (6 tiles) - Total 18/18 tiles found

homescreen_talk_to_expert_primary.details: Talk to Expert button is PRIMARY with teal background rgb(62, 130, 122)

homescreen_chat_with_mira_secondary.details: Chat with Mira (AI) button is SECONDARY with white background rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)

tile_navigation_to_landing.details: Clicking tiles navigates to TopicLandingPage correctly (tested career_clarity, relationship_healing, stress_management)

landing_header_title.details: Header shows correct title (Career Clarity, Relationship Healing, Stress & Anxiety)

landing_hero_one_line_promise.details: Hero section shows one-line promise text from V6 content

landing_personalized_greeting.details: 'Hi there, here are the paths you can choose for your journey' displayed correctly

landing_tier_selector_tabs.details: 3 tabs (Focussed, Supported, Comprehensive) with Recommended badge ONLY on Supported

landing_tier_summary_card.details: Shows Duration, Consultations, Follow-ups, Support: Unlimited chat from V6 Excel structure

landing_refund_guarantee.details: 'No questions asked — 7 day full refund guarantee' appears after tier summary

landing_outcomes_section.details: Shows Clarity, Timeline, Support subsections with proper bullets

landing_journey_unfold_section.details: 'How will your journey unfold' section shows tier-specific bullets

landing_experts_widget.details: Experts widget with 3 expert cards and horizontal scroll container

landing_sticky_bar.details: Sticky bar shows Price (₹6,999/₹10,999) + 'Start my journey' button only

tier_switching.details: Switching between Focussed/Supported/Comprehensive updates tier summary card content correctly
